description: Email uniqueness checked before user record created
blockConditions: user record created without prior uniqueness check on email
email uniqueness check bypassed via tenant configuration
storeDocument called before setIfAbsent(email) returns success
passConditions: setIfAbsent(email) returns success before storeDocument
duplicate email returns DataProcessResult.failure('DUPLICATE_EMAIL') without writing

description: Idempotency: duplicate registration (same email + correlationId) returns existing record
blockConditions: duplicate registration with same email+correlationId creates a second user record
idempotency key auth_attempt:<userId>:<correlationId> not checked before processing
second registration attempt overwrites existing user state
passConditions: setIfAbsent(auth_attempt:<userId>:<correlationId>) used before processing
collision returns existing record without error

blockConditions: resend allowed without checking last_resend_at
rate limit value hardcoded instead of read from FREEDOM config
multiple resends within rate limit window succeed without rejection
passConditions: IScopedMemoryService checked for last_resend_at before resend
rate limit value read from FREEDOM config at runtime
ResendRejected emitted when within rate limit window
resolution: Check last_resend_at via IScopedMemoryService. Rate limit value from FREEDOM config.

description: Tenant scope via AsyncLocalStorage — no tenantId param
blockConditions: OnboardingCompleted emitted before all required steps complete
completedSteps.length < requiredSteps.length at emit time
tenantId sourced from event payload instead of AsyncLocalStorage
passConditions: completedSteps.length equals requiredSteps.length before OnboardingCompleted emits
tenantId read from AsyncLocalStorage only
resolution: completedSteps.length must equal requiredSteps.length before UserOnboardingCompleted emits.

description: ChangeEmailRequested revokes existing token before issuing new one
blockConditions: new verification token stored before existing token revoked
enqueue called before storeDocument(revoke existing token)
email change proceeds without revoking prior token
passConditions: storeDocument(revoke existing token) called before storeDocument(new token)
storeDocument precedes enqueue per DNA-8 outbox pattern
resolution: DNA-8: storeDocument(revoke existing) BEFORE storeDocument(new token).

description: No PII in queue event payloads — userId as reference only
blockConditions: event payload contains email field
event payload contains password or password hash field
event payload contains name, phone, or address field
PII field included in any queue event payload
passConditions: event payload contains only userId, tokenId, correlationId
all PII removed from queue event payload before enqueue
resolution: Event payload may contain userId/tokenId/correlationId only. Flag email, password, name, phone as BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T47 UserRegistrationService: xiigen-user-registrations index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant registration reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only.
blockConditions: user registration record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored registration record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: User registration records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-user-registrations reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T48 EmailVerificationService: xiigen-user-verification index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant verification token reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only.
blockConditions: verification token stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored token record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Verification token records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-user-verification reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

description: T49 OnboardingOrchestrationService: xiigen-user-onboarding index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant onboarding reads are forbidden. OnboardingCompleted event emitted only after all steps complete for current tenant.
blockConditions: onboarding record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored onboarding record
OnboardingCompleted emitted with tenantId from event payload instead of ALS
passConditions: Onboarding records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
OnboardingCompleted event emitted with tenantId from cls.get().tenantId — never from event payload
All xiigen-user-onboarding reads include tenantId predicate from ALS
